title: Luffy and Nami Are Taken Prisoner
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Pedro, Pudding as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, I hear that the female had Lola's Vivre card...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Which is why the homes couldn't lay a hand on her even within the forest.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By the way, Mama does not approve of the dress you chose yesterday, Lady pudding.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please wear the one she picked out for you during the ceremony tomorrow instead.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mama has planned out everything that needs to happen after the ceremony as well! Also...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: PUDDING! You'll never go wrong if you simply listen to my orders.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're just like a sweet little doll, darling.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, Lady pudding! Care- FUL, it's still raining in the garden!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't worry, girl! She won't kill me. We're family, after all!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll make sure I'll be the one to decide my own marriage!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The treasure room security has been com- plenty wiped out!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The one reason- Bible is in possession of a bomb!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's around the courtyard of the 3rd floor of Ambaum now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Plan to corner him in the garden- Soir!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 37 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
